message:
feat(choreography): add comprehensive unit and E2E tests for projection and codegen (bd-1f8jn.4)

Add 207 tests across the choreography module:

mod.rs (138 tests):
- Projection completeness, duality, and edge cases
- Knowledge-of-choice validation for nested/loop/compensation contexts
- Builder API, Display, stats consistency, first_active_participant coverage
- Proptest-based fuzzing (5 strategies × 200 cases) for validation
  invariants, referenced participant subsets, projection completeness,
  duality, and stats consistency

codegen.rs (34 tests):
- Codegen determinism, message struct dedup, session type structure
- CALM annotation correctness, complexity counting, CompilationError Display

pipeline.rs (35 tests, 12 new E2E):
- scatter_gather_disjoint through full pipeline
- Codegen determinism with hash-based golden checks across all 4 protocols
- Cross-protocol structural invariants (Cx, evidence, session types, lab test)
- plan_only consistency with generate (step count, labels, ops)
- Compensation boundary markers, CALM batch analysis
- Pipeline error paths (invalid protocol rejection)

Items 6-7 (fault injection, equivalence testing) deferred pending
FrankenLab harness (bd-1hu19).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
